name: ubaka-tech-ecosystem-monorepo
description: Unified monorepo workspace for Ubaka Tech ecosystem applications

scripts.dev:ubaka: concurrently "npm run dev -w inzozigroup/inzozi-backend" "npm run dev -w inzozigroup/inzozi-frontend"
scripts.dev:kurimacye: concurrently "npm run dev -w kurimacye/kurimacye-backend" "npm run dev -w kurimacye/kurimacye-frontend"
